events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary drummer, Ringo Starr, born Richard Starkey, celebrates his 86th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Ringo's Rhythm
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're celebrating the one and only Ringo Starr, who turns 86! The man who kept the beat for the biggest band in history, his influence is undeniable.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the legendary Brian May! From stadium-filling riffs with Queen to his work as an astrophysicist, he truly is a rock star of many talents.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' electrifying frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, will be celebrating his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Timeless Rock Icon
angles.copy: Still moving like Jagger at 83! Tomorrow, we celebrate the birthday of the incredible Mick Jagger, a true titan of rock and roll.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: MTV, the music television channel, launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast.

angles.name: The Day Music TV Began
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever! Remember seeing 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as the very first video? A true game-changer.

events.title: Oasis 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, marking 32 years since its impact on British music.

angles.name: Britpop Debut Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years ago this month, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and kicked off a Britpop revolution. What's your favourite track from that iconic debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, a pivotal moment in music history.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, the Woodstock Festival began – three days of peace, love, and iconic music that defined a generation. Imagine being there!

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years on
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: The King's Legacy
angles.copy: 49 years ago today, the world lost Elvis Presley. His music and charisma continue to captivate, a true legend who would have been 91 this year.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur, 30 years since shooting
events.blurb: September 7, 1996, marks 30 years since Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas; he would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Tupac's Enduring Voice
angles.copy: 30 years ago this month, the music world was rocked by the shooting of Tupac Shakur in Las Vegas. His powerful voice and legacy continue to resonate. He would have been 55.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, 56 years on
events.blurb: September 18, 2026, marks 56 years since the passing of the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar Genius Remembered
angles.copy: Today, we remember the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix, who left us 56 years ago. His groundbreaking guitar work changed music forever. He would have been 84.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, making it 57 years old.

angles.name: Abbey Road's Enduring Walk
angles.copy: 57 years ago this month, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those tracks – pure magic. What's your favourite moment from their final recorded masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders' Powerhouse
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, her distinctive voice and attitude have inspired generations.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and solo artist, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! From Oasis anthems to his solo hits, his unique swagger is still essential listening.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in October 1971, marking 55 years since its profound message reached the world.

angles.name: Imagine's Enduring Message
angles.copy: 55 years ago this month, John Lennon released 'Imagine', a song that continues to inspire peace and unity across the globe. Its message feels as relevant as ever.

events.title: First iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: The first-generation Apple iPod was introduced on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we carry our music, marking its 25th anniversary.

angles.name: The Music Revolution Turns 25
angles.copy: Remember the first time you got your hands on an iPod? 25 years ago this month, Apple launched the original, changing how we listen to music forever.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the 64th anniversary of the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Today marks 64 years since 'Dr. No' premiered, kicking off the iconic 007 film franchise. Who's your favourite Bond?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today marks what would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' co-founder, John Lennon.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy Lives On
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the incomparable John Lennon. His music and message of peace continue to inspire.
